title: Instant XP
description: Instant XP removes the normal pickup delay and range limitations of experience orbs in Minecraft. Instead of waiting to walk near an orb, the XP is instantly transferred to the nearest player the moment the orb updates.
body:
Instant XP 1.0.0 (Fabric, Mincraft Java 1.21.11)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/UG5s1vXfUXM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![XP from zombie get instant counted as level without having to pick up the XP orbs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ecfcecb369181eaaf881cf1a6c4d91142d15de0.jpeg)
Instant XP removes the normal pickup delay and range limitations of experience orbs in Minecraft. Instead of waiting to walk near an orb, the XP is instantly transferred to the nearest player the moment the orb updates.

This makes experience collection smoother, faster, and far less annoying — especially when large numbers of orbs are created.

"Made the mod for personally use, in my single player world, not tested for multiplayer or servers but like to give the closest person to xp source the xp when killed in multiplayer"

What this mod does
When an experience orb exists in the world:

• The mod checks for the nearest player
• The orb's XP value is immediately given to that player
• The orb is removed instantly

This bypasses Minecraft’s normal pickup radius and attraction mechanics, so you no longer need to walk around collecting XP.

The result is instant experience gain with zero orb clutter.

Why use Instant XP?
Vanilla Minecraft can generate hundreds of experience orbs from:

mob farms

mining large ore veins

smelting systems

large mob battles

These orbs can cause:

lag from entity buildup

messy XP clouds everywhere

slow XP collection

Instant XP fixes this by converting XP orbs directly into experience points the moment they tick.

Features
• Instant XP gain
• Removes XP orb pickup delay
• Reduces entity clutter from XP orbs
• Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer
• Extremely lightweight
• Compatible with most Fabric mods

Performance benefits
Large farms and mob grinders often produce thousands of experience orbs. Because this mod removes orbs immediately after granting XP, it can significantly reduce:

entity counts

server lag

client rendering load

This makes it particularly useful for large automated farms.

Compatibility
Instant XP is built for the Fabric Loader and works alongside common Fabric performance mods such as:

Sodium

Iris Shaders

Lithium

C2ME

It does not change gameplay balance beyond XP pickup behavior.

Requirements
Minecraft 1.21.11

Fabric Loader 0.18.1 or newer

Installation
Install Fabric Loader

Download the mod .jar

Place the file into your .minecraft/mods folder

Launch the game using the Fabric profile

Known limitations
The mod currently awards XP to the nearest player when an orb updates.

In singleplayer this will always be you not sure about multiplayers
